assertions.assertion: Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Required = true in AddIdentityServer options
Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Lifetime = 300 (5 minutes in seconds, as int not TimeSpan)
assertions.rationale: Code sets options.PushedAuthorization.Lifetime = 300 as an int value.

assertions.assertion: Sets RequirePushedAuthorization = true on the banking_app client
assertions.rationale: The banking_app client has RequirePushedAuthorization = true.

assertions.assertion: Sets PushedAuthorizationLifetime = 900 on the banking_app client to override global lifetime
Mentions PAR requires Business or Enterprise edition (version >= 7.0)
assertions.rationale: Response states 'PAR requires Duende IdentityServer Business or Enterprise Edition, version >= 7.0'.
